expectations.text: Output classifies the task as Tier 3
Decision A is Codex (default, no --agents flag)
expectations.evidence: DECISION A: 'Codex — no --agents flag passed, default coder identity for Tier 3 is Codex (per Decision A table: "default → Codex")'

expectations.text: Decision B is multiple Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent / Phase 3.3 wave dispatch / bash transport
expectations.evidence: DECISION B: 'Multiple Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent in wave layout (Phase 3.3 wave dispatch, bash transport via swarm-transport.sh)'

expectations.text: Output explicitly forbids mcp__codex__codex per the HARD RULE (no MCP for dispatch)
expectations.evidence: DECISION B: 'NOT mcp__codex__codex (HARD RULE forbids MCP for dispatch)'

expectations.text: Output names Codex pane as the plan reviewer (Phase 2.5)
expectations.evidence: CROSS-MODEL: 'Plan reviewer = Codex pane (Phase 2.5.2 spawns it — Codex pane is always the plan reviewer per the cross-model rule recap, regardless of coder identity)'

expectations.text: Output names Claude Opus in-process via Skill('superpowers:requesting-code-review') as the code reviewer (Phase 4.3b — opposite-model from Codex coder)
expectations.evidence: CROSS-MODEL: 'Code reviewer = Claude Opus in-process via Skill("superpowers:requesting-code-review") (Phase 4.3b) — because the coder is Codex, the opposite-model code reviewer is Claude Opus per the rule "Codex coder → Claude reviews"'

expectations.text: Output does NOT use Native AgentTeam (that variant requires --agents claude)
expectations.evidence: DECISION B: 'NOT Native AgentTeam (that's the Tier 3 + --agents claude variant)'
